title: Bridge Essay: Full body illusion and cognition: A systematic review of the literature.
concept: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**Full body illusion and cognition: A systematic review of the literature.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2022.104926. PMID: 36341941. In recent years, an increasing number of studies employed the full body illusion paradigm (i.e., the experimentally induced illusory ownership over a fake/virtual body) to investigate the role of body ownership in higher-level cognition. However, to date, no systematic review of this topic is present. To fill this gap, here we identified 102 papers classifiable in 4 cognitive domains and 12 subdomains.
